incident.name: VPN access failing on new MacBook
incident.description:
Hi IT team — my newly issued MacBook can't connect to the VPN. I'm using the same credentials that worked on my previous laptop. Cisco AnyConnect shows authentication failed even though my password works fine for SSO into other Acme apps.

Steps I've tried:

  • Restarted the Mac
  • Reinstalled Cisco AnyConnect
  • Confirmed my password works on the SSO portal

Can you take a look? I'm working from home and blocked on a few internal tools.
incident.description_no_html: Hi IT team — my newly issued MacBook can't connect to the VPN…
